case_title: KENNETH ALAN SLAYEN VS. DESIGN DRAW BUILD INC.

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY SLAYEN, KENNETH ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGN DRAW BUILD INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGN DRAW BUILD INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KENNETH ALAN SLAYEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DESIGN DRAW BUILD INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LEANNE DAVIS CONTROLLER AND TYLER KOBICK OWNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SLAYEN, KENNETH ALAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESIGN DRAW BUILD INC. $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,475.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $140.00) SERVED MAY-24-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DESIGN DRAW BUILD INC.
